name: ts-orm-benchmark
description: ⚡ TypeScript ORM & query builder SQL generation benchmark — UQL vs Sequelize vs TypeORM vs MikroORM vs Drizzle vs Knex vs Kysely

scripts.bench: npx vitest bench --run --outputJson bench-latest.json && bun scripts/update-results.ts bench-latest.json && biome check --write --unsafe results.js README.md && rm -f bench-latest.json

author: Roger Padilla <sonemonu@gmail.com>
